role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and lighting.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Pine/Birch) and growth habits.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and guardrail infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera artifacts and infrastructure styling.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Norway. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (guardrails, birch/pine mix) that converged on the correct answer. The linguistic agent correctly noted the absence of text.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the river valley and coniferous/birch forest.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately identified the visible tree types.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the yellow center line and guardrail.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately noted the image quality and lighting.
